data.title: RED: Add design:awaiting_import filter test to sprint-next-batch test suite
data.description:
## Description

Add test cases to `tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch.sh` (or a new companion file `tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch-design-filter.sh`) that verify sprint-next-batch.sh filters tasks whose parent story has the `design:awaiting_import` tag.

### Test scenarios
1. A story with `design:awaiting_import` tag → its child tasks should appear as `SKIPPED_DESIGN_AWAITING` in output
2. A story without the tag → its child tasks should appear normally in TASK output
3. A story with `design:approved` tag (not awaiting) → its child tasks should appear normally

### Files to modify
- Create or modify: `tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch-design-filter.sh`

## TDD Requirement
These tests MUST FAIL (RED) before sprint-next-batch.sh is modified. Test approach: create fixture tickets with design:awaiting_import tag, run sprint-next-batch.sh, and assert SKIPPED_DESIGN_AWAITING appears in output. Currently the script has no tag-based filtering, so these assertions will fail.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] `bash tests/run-all.sh` passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch-design-filter.sh
- [ ] Test creates fixture with design:awaiting_import tag and asserts SKIPPED_DESIGN_AWAITING output
  Verify: grep -q 'SKIPPED_DESIGN_AWAITING' tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch-design-filter.sh
- [ ] Test verifies non-tagged stories are NOT skipped
  Verify: grep -q 'design:approved\|without.*tag' tests/scripts/test-sprint-next-batch-design-filter.sh
- [ ] `.test-index` entry maps `sprint-next-batch.sh` to the new test file
  Verify: grep -q 'sprint-next-batch-design-filter' .test-index
